positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a whimsical, flying mountain range and hot air balloons drifting across a pastel-colored dawn sky. The scene features bold, clean silhouettes of diverse wildlife—like gentle rhinos, soaring eagles, and stylized foxes—interacting with the landscape. The composition is centered and vertical, with strong visual contrast between the deep indigo shadows of the mountains and the soft, glowing coral and lavender hues of the sky. Perfect for a high-quality screen-printed T-shirt; flat, vector-art quality with crisp lines and solid color blocks. Mid-century modern aesthetic meets Nordic illustration style. Clean white background space around the main composition.
negative: photorealism, bokeh, blur, noise, gradient, text, logo, watermark, signature, messy, grainy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low contrast, cluttered, complex shading
